title: Submitting a Grievance, Complaint, or HR Concern
text:
Q: How do I submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern?
A: To submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern, please follow these steps: First, document your concern clearly, including dates, times, and any relevant details. Next, reach out to your immediate supervisor to discuss the issue informally, if comfortable. If the issue is not resolved or you prefer not to speak with your supervisor, you can submit a formal grievance by filling out the 'Grievance Form' available on the company intranet. Submit this form to the HR department via email or in person within 10 business days of the incident. HR will acknowledge receipt of your grievance within 5 business days and will initiate an investigation. You can expect a resolution or update within 30 days. For further assistance, you may contact the HR department directly at hr@company.com or call extension 1234.
